senses.gloss: The meaning of this term is uncertain. Possibilities include:; abundance
The meaning of this term is uncertain. Possibilities include:; abundant sand or dust
The meaning of this term is uncertain. Possibilities include:; abundant goodness (in forelife and afterlife)
The meaning of this term is uncertain. Possibilities include:; a name of a river in Paradise; the Pond of Abundance.
The meaning of this term is uncertain. Possibilities include:; The 108th sura of the Quran; Al-Kawthar.

etymology.text: See the etymology of the corresponding lemma form.

body.text: much good, and who gives much
pertaining specially to the Prophet, described as being whiter than milk and sweeter than honey and as having its margin composed of pavilions of hollowed pearls.

entries.lexicon_en: Habib Anthony Salmone, An Advanced Learner's Arabic-English Dictionary (1889)
entries.lexicon_ar: حبيب سالمون، قاموس عربي انجليزي متقدم للمتعلمين

entries.lexicon_en: Muḥammad al-Fattinī, Majmaʿ Biḥār al-Anwār fī Gharāʾib al-Tanzīl wa Laṭāʾif al-Akhbār (d. 1578 CE)
entries.body_html: [كوثر] فيه: أعطيت "الكوثر"، وهو نهر في الجنة، وهو فوعل بمعنى الخير الكثير، وورد أنه القرآن والنبوة وهو لغة: الرجل الكثير العطاء.

entries.lexicon_en: Habib Anthony Salmone, An Advanced Learner's Arabic-English Dictionary (1889)
entries.lexicon_ar: حبيب سالمون، قاموس عربي انجليزي متقدم للمتعلمين
entries.body_html:
كوثر
كَوْثَرَ
a. [ coll. ]
see كَثُرَ
(a).
تَكَوْثَرَa. Was thick (dust).
كَوْثَرa. Abundant; numerous.
b. Generous.
c. Thick (dust).
كَوْثَل
a. Helm, rudder.
b. Stern ( of a vessel ).
